152555-152555==g[u]then g[u],e[u]=nil,nil end end,function(u,K)local A=r(K)local f=function(...)return P(u,{...},K,A)end return f end,function(u,K)local A=r(K)local f=function(f,z,B,V)return P(u,{f,z;B;V},K,A)end return f end,function()a=(-126082-(-126083))+a g[a]=491889+-491888 return a end,function(u)local K,P=277156-277155,u[-680380-(-680381)]while P do table[K(-962205-(-929460))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
